title: D2.3 Molecular probe
author: Chatillon, Caroline
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Deliverable 2.3 -“Molecular probe” has been developed within task 2.4 of WP2. This document describes the development of specific molecular probes (primers and probes for Real-Time PCR) to idenGfy fungal isolate used for the inoculaGon through a diagnosGc tool.
steps_raw: Deliverable 2.3 -“Molecular probe” has been developed within task 2.4 of WP2. This document describes the development of specific molecular probes (primers and probes for Real-Time PCR) to idenGfy fungal isolate used for the inoculaGon through a diagnosGc tool.
